name: Bambu Hotend H2-P2S — 0.2 mm Stainless Steel
notes: Ultra-fine detail only. DO NOT use with CF/GF/abrasive filaments — stainless wears rapidly. PLA/PETG/ABS standard grades only.

name: Bambu Hotend H2-P2S — 0.4 mm Hardened Steel
notes: General-purpose workhorse. Safe for CF/GF abrasives. Default for all AMS multi-color jobs.

name: Bambu Hotend H2-P2S — 0.6 mm Hardened Steel
notes: Large functional parts, engineering filaments. Hardened steel handles CF/GF.

name: Bambu Hotend H2-P2S — 0.8 mm Hardened Steel
notes: Maximum throughput; coarse detail. Hardened steel safe for abrasives.

name: Bambu High Flow Hotend H2-P2S — 0.4 mm Hardened Steel
notes: ~62% higher max volumetric speed vs standard flow at 0.4 mm. Use Bambu Studio High Flow nozzle profile. Safe for CF/GF.

name: Bambu High Flow Hotend H2-P2S — 0.6 mm Hardened Steel
notes: Primary choice for PA6-CF, PETG-CF, ABS-GF, PPA-CF fast printing. Use High Flow slicer profile.

name: Bambu High Flow Hotend H2-P2S — 0.8 mm Hardened Steel
notes: Maximum throughput nozzle. Best for large jigs, fixtures, drafts. Use 0.8 mm High Flow slicer profile.

name: Bambu Tungsten Carbide Nozzle H2-P2S — 0.4 mm
notes: For high-wear abrasive filaments (CF/GF/metal-fill). Tungsten carbide outlasts hardened steel significantly. Nozzle-only replacement — press-fit into existing hotend heating assembly.

name: Bambu Tungsten Carbide Nozzle H2-P2S — 0.6 mm
notes: Best for bulk CF/GF printing at 0.6 mm. Use with High Flow heating assembly for max throughput on abrasives.

name: Bambu Tungsten Carbide Nozzle H2-P2S — 0.8 mm
notes: Maximum throughput abrasive printing. Verify before ordering that you need nozzle-only vs full hotend assembly.

name: Bambu High Flow Tungsten Carbide Nozzle H2-P2S — 0.4 mm
notes: High flow + tungsten carbide = highest durability for abrasive materials at 0.4 mm. Premium option.

name: Bambu High Flow Tungsten Carbide Nozzle H2-P2S — 0.6 mm
notes: High flow + tungsten carbide at 0.6 mm. Best combination for bulk CF/GF production printing.

name: Bambu High Flow Tungsten Carbide Nozzle H2-P2S — 0.8 mm
notes: Maximum throughput + maximum wear resistance. Niche: very high-volume abrasive printing.

name: Bambu Textured PEI Plate — 256 mm (P2S / X1 / P1 Series)
notes: Default plate shipped with P2S. Flex steel magnetic spring plate with sprayed dual-sided textured PEI. Works with PLA, PETG, ABS, ASA, PA, PC. Older plates without QR code: select 'Ignore' for plate detection or disable feature.

name: Bambu Smooth PEI Plate — 256 mm (P2S / X1 / P1 Series)
notes: Smooth surface finish on bottom of prints. Good for PLA, PETG, ABS, PA. Occasional stock shortages — check availability.

name: Bambu Cool Plate SuperTack Pro — 256 mm (P2S / X1 / P1 / A1)
notes: PLA/PETG without glue stick. Parts auto-release on cooling. Do not use above recommended bed temps — can damage coating. P2S explicitly listed as compatible.

name: Bambu Engineering Plate — 256 mm (P2S / X1 / P1 / A1)
notes: For ABS, PC, PA, ASA requiring high-temp bed. Use with glue stick for best adhesion. P2S explicitly compatible.

name: Bambu Hotend Silicone Sock — P2S (3-pack)
notes: P2S-specific — NOT compatible with H2D, A1, or P1S. Maintains stable nozzle temperature, protects from ooze. Replace when torn or deformed. ~3-pack per unit.

name: Nozzle Wiping Pad — P2S
notes: P2S-specific consumable. Soft silicone pad on the purge wiper; cleans nozzle residue before each print. Replace when worn/compressed. Consumable — keep 2–3 in stock.

name: Purge Wiper Assembly — P2S
notes: P2S-specific — DO NOT install on X1 or P1. Full wiper assembly (not just the pad). Replace if damaged or if wiper calibration repeatedly fails.

name: Filament Cutter Replacement — P2S
notes: Cutter blade (compatible with P2S per FAQ). Replace every 8–12 spools for PLA/PETG/ABS/PC; every 4–10 spools for CF/GF abrasives. Note: cutter LEVER is NOT P1S-compatible; blade only is compatible.

name: Activated Carbon Air Filter — P2S
notes: P2S-specific filter; larger surface area than P1. Replace when saturated (visible discoloration or VOC smell). Rinse cover if needed, dry fully before reinstall.

name: Hotend Cooling Fan — P2S
notes: Cools upper hotend to prevent heat creep. Replace if noisy, seized, or if HMS reports thermal runaway / extruder overload alongside heat-creep symptoms.

name: Auxiliary Part Cooling Fan — Left (P2S)
notes: Extra part cooling for left-side slot; improves cooling balance. Also the spare unit if the installed aux fan fails. Installation guide: wiki .../install-auxiliary-part-cooling-fan-left.

name: Extruder Gear Assembly — P2S
notes: NOT compatible with P1S — P2S uses different PMSM servo extruder with hardened steel gears. Replace if grinding, slipping, or under-extrusion persists after cleaning. Periodic cleaning + re-grease recommended before replacement.

name: XY Belt — P2S
notes: NOT compatible with P1S (different sizes). Replace when belt tension HMS warning appears and re-tensioning does not resolve it, or on visible cracking. Two belts per printer (X + Y).

name: Eddy Current Sensor — P2S
notes: Active flow calibration + auto bed leveling sensor. Replace if bed leveling fails consistently after re-calibration. Adjustment guide: wiki .../adjust-the-eddy-sensor.

name: Desiccant for AMS 2 Pro and AMS HT — 6-pack
notes: Color-changing silicone desiccant — yellow when fresh, turns purple when saturated. Recharge by drying at 80 °C for 1–2 h or via AMS 2 Pro drying cycle. Keep 1–2 spare packs in stock.

name: AMS 2 Pro Feeder Unit
notes: Core filament transport module per slot. Ceramic-reinforced bushings. 4 per AMS 2 Pro unit. Replace if feeder grinds filament, fails to retract, or motor shows overload error. Verify stock before ordering — frequently sells out.

name: PTFE Tube — AMS 2 Pro Internal
notes: AMS 2 Pro internal routing tube. Replace if cracked, discoloured by abrasive filaments, or if filament tangles consistently in the AMS path.

name: Bambu Lubricant Oil — 6-pack
notes: For X/Y hollow steel rods and Z guide rails ONLY. Never apply grease to shafts. 1–2 drops per 5 cm, spread by moving toolhead/bed 3–5×. Included in P2S toolbox; restock when depleted.

name: Bambu Lubricant Grease
notes: For Z-axis lead screws and extruder gear assembly. Never use on rods/rails — oil only for those. Included in P2S toolbox; restock when depleted.

name: Hotend Heating Assembly — P2S
notes: NOT compatible with H2D or A1. Contains heater block, thermistor, heater cartridge. Replace after hotend blob damage or thermistor/heater cartridge failure. Full procedure: wiki .../replace-heating-assembly.
